dialogos.texto_en: Oh, Uesugi-kun?
What are you doing here?
I was thinking of looking around for shops\nthat sell small items...
But I got lost\nbecause I was so captivated by the scenery around me,\nand wandered off course.
What, you got lost?
No.\nI just lost my sense of direction.
Yeah, yeah.\nWell, I can understand being captivated\nby the scenery.
Yes, the colorful buildings and wall art are\ninteresting just to look at.
(There's many great photo spots around here.\n Is it Ichika or Nino that might like this kind of place?)
I was just thinking that maybe this \nflamboyant look stands out is\nbecause in Okinawa there's strong sunlight.
But it's a bit too flashy...\nIt makes me tired just looking at it.
What, you don't like this kind of place?
It's not that I don't like it...
Maybe I just prefer a more calm atmosphere.
(...That sounded oddly detached.)
What kind of place, for example?
Let's see.\nMaybe my own room, perhaps.
Seems like you'd hide sweets in various places.
Huh?
We're talking about you.\nIf you don't have to worry about being hungry,\nyou can relax, right?
...I wouldn't do something so childish, you know?
Well, they say a person's room\nreflects their personality and interests.\nOther people's rooms%p-2;――
Hey, are you imagining our rooms?!\nThose are WOMEN'S rooms, you know?!
...I can't imagine it.
I wouldn't be surprised.\nIt seems you've never been inside\na woman's room before.
That's not true. I've been inside Nino's room before.
Oh... Come to think of it, you have, huh?
And, maybe Miku and Ichika's rooms too?
...You sure do get around, don't you?
Well, they say a person's room\nreflects their personality and interests.\nOther people's rooms%p-2;――
Hey, are you imagining our rooms?!\nThose are WOMEN'S rooms, you know?!
I bet your room would be neat and tidy.
Of course. I've always made sure\nto have an environment suitable for studying.
Indeed, having a conducive environment\nfor concentration is important. I can appreciate that.
Teehee, yes, naturally.
Although it took time for that to lead to good grades.
You always have so much to say, don't you.
Well, they say a person's room\nreflects their personality and interests.\nOther people's rooms%p-2;――
Hey, are you imagining our rooms?!\nThose are WOMEN'S rooms, you know?!
Huh?
You really have no sense of delicacy, do you!
Well, was that really an issue?\nConsidering the flow of the conversation,\nit's a normal thing to think about, right?
That's the issue!\nReflect on yourself, properly!
O-okay.
(I guess I shouldn't even try to imagine it.\n It's just too difficult or bothersome...)
